Given these 3 user corrections all related to "content":
- Use specific infrastructure terms instead of generic follow-ups.
- Replace hedging with concrete modernization language.
- Swap vague openers for precise technical references.

Write ONE actionable behavioral principle (1-2 sentences) that captures the pattern.
Format: "When [context], [do X] instead of [Y]."
Do not list individual words. Focus on the behavioral change.
Return ONLY the principle, no preamble.
